enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nee Yeppo Pulla'?

The song expresses feelings of longing and the complexities of love, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of 'Kumki' related to this song?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Kumki, highlighting the emotional struggles of the characters as they navigate their feelings.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Alphonse and composed by D Imman, known for their beautiful collaboration in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Nee Yeppo Pulla' released?

The song was released on August 28, 2012, as part of the Kumki soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nee Yeppo Pulla, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of longing and love, perfectly encapsulated in the soothing melody. The song serves as a backdrop to significant moments in Kumki, enhancing the narrative with its heartfelt lyrics and Alphonse's captivating voice. It evokes a sense of nostalgia and yearning, making it relatable to anyone who has loved and lost. The combination of D Imman's music and Yugabharathi's lyrics creates a memorable experience that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Yeppo Pulla from Kumki is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and romance. With Alphonse's soulful vocals and D Imman's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love's bittersweet moments. Dive into this lyrical journey that perfectly blends emotion and artistry, making it a must-listen for Tamil music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: When will you tell me, if you do something wrong, you will be thrown away? When will you tell me?
You should slowly say a word, if you don't, you will be caught by me.
When will you... when will you tell me?
You are pretending to be innocent, but what happened yesterday in front of your eyes? There is no love in this, it’s all a show, what flower are you?
The thorny flower has a fragrance, if you keep it close, it will be bad... bad.
When will you... when will you tell me?
The silver moon and the betel leaf, my world is yours, I was here, what should I say? The love that came is not a mistake... no, in my eyes, there are no tears, I am slowly... slowly.
When will you... when will you tell me?
You should slowly say a word, if you don't, you will be caught by me.
When will you... when will you tell me?
